headline: Can CRUS' Audio Converter Launch Diversify Revenue Streams & Boost Sales?
summary: Cirrus Logic expands its audio converter lineup with nine new ADCs, DACs and CODECs aimed at the fast-growing $9B pro audio market.

headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Micron Technologies, Sandisk, Vishay Intertechnology, ON Semiconductor, Texas Instruments and Analog Devices
summary: Vishay Intertechnology has surged nearly 200% in two months as rising orders, backlog growth and AI-linked demand fuel the analog chip recovery.

headline: Raymond James Raises its Price Target on Analog Devices (ADI)
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is one of the 12 Strong Buy Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 21, 2026, Raymond James raised the firm’s price target on Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) to $430 from $385 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares.
